## How it's calculated

Estimated monthly OpenAI API costs.

This calculator applies the formula using your input values, checking typical ranges and alerting you to unrealistic values.

## Final notes

This calculation is an informational reference. For critical decisions (financial, medical, legal), consult with a qualified professional. Pricing reflects 2026 rates and is reviewed regularly.

faq.q: How many characters equal one token?
faq.a: Approximately 4 characters per token. 1,000 tokens ≈ 750 words.

faq.q: How much does GPT-4 Turbo cost?
faq.a: $10 per million input tokens, $30 per million output tokens.
$5 per million input tokens, $15 per million output tokens (more cost-effective).

faq.q: How much does GPT-3.5 Turbo cost?
faq.a: $0.50 per million input tokens, $1.50 per million output tokens.

faq.q: How can I reduce API costs?
faq.a: Prompt caching reduces input token costs by 50% for repeated prompts.

faq.q: What is the Batch API discount?
Is this calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes, all our calculators are free and require no account.
